message:
fix: convert multi-row INSERT OR IGNORE to row-wise for frankensqlite compat

FrankenSQLite internally treats multi-row VALUES lists as INSERT...SELECT,
which rejects UPSERT/OR IGNORE conflict clauses. This caused `cass index`
to fail with: "INSERT ... SELECT fallback does not support UPSERT/RETURNING"

Convert franken_insert_token_usage_batched_in_tx and
franken_insert_message_metrics_batched_in_tx from multi-row batched inserts
to row-wise INSERT OR IGNORE, matching the pattern already used by
franken_update_daily_stats_batched_in_tx and
franken_update_token_daily_stats_batched_in_tx.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
